title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 362.466 - Applicability of law — rights, powers, protections
text:
362.466.  Applicability of law — rights, powers, protections. — Any bank or trust company holding deposit accounts pursuant to this chapter shall have the same rights, powers and protections provided a bank or trust company under subsection 6 of section 362.471 as it relates to any account; nor shall any law impose a duty to the contrary on such bank or trust company.
(L. 1997 H.B. 257)
